text:
What Trump has done to your healthcare:

- Cut $1 TRILLION from Medicaid and Medicare
- Fired 20,000+ public health workers
- Gutted the childhood vaccine schedule, dropping 6 vaccines
- Cancelled $500M in mRNA vaccine research
- Defunded pandemic preparedness programs
- Killed cancer research grants worth $2.4 billion
- US lost measles elimination. Kids died.

This isn't politics. This is a body count.
